content.question: What is the current and projected utilization rate of dormitory infrastructure serving 6/8-year gimnazium students in different regions, and how would continued cohort decline affect this capacity buffer over the next decade?
content.reduction_path: Audit dormitory occupancy and capacity by region and track type; project forward using confirmed enrollment decline rates and in-migration data for urban/county-seat catchments to identify the threshold at which dormitory under-utilization becomes economically unsustainable.
